name: mame2js
description: Knowledge-graph-first transpiler: MAME driver source -> runnable browser (canvas) emulator app

scripts.gen:all: for g in galaga pacman galaxian gyruss invaders mpatrol gng junofrst; do node bin/mame2js.js $g || exit 1; done
scripts.test: tsc --noEmit && for f in src/runtime/*.spec.ts src/runtime/*/*.spec.ts; do node $f > /dev/null || { echo "FAIL $f"; exit 1; }; echo "PASS $f"; done
